message:
refactor(distributed): simplify gap handling and enhance test coverage

Remove distributed_agent_gap_notice_for_persisted_gap() helper and its
call site in distributed_agent_stream_event(). Gap boundaries (seq_before,
seq_after, detected_at_ms) are now carried directly in GapDetected event
payloads, eliminating post-hoc storage lookups.

Wire protocol testing:
- Add streamer_preserves_distinct_bounds_for_same_reason_gap_events test
  validating consecutive gaps with same reason but different bounds

Proptest updates:
- Extend arb_event() generator to cover seq_before, seq_after, and
  detected_at_ms fields for GapDetected variant

Integration test refactoring:
- Rewrite distributed_persist_payload_gap_event_carries_recorded_bounds
  to test end-to-end gap propagation instead of isolated helper function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
